|desc={{p|Palossand}} is Acerola's first known Pokémon. It was first used as a {{p|Sandygast}} to rescue {{adv|Sun}} and [[Lillie]] after they washed ashore on [[Ula'ula Island]]. It used its powers to lift the two into the air and helped move them to the Aether House. Later, it was used to battle the {{p|Pheromosa}} [[Guzma]] used at [[Po Town]], but was defeated. After training with the other [[Trial Captain|captains]] on [[Exeggutor Island]], it evolved into a Palossand.

None of Palossand's moves are known.}}
